root.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be in my way by being within range of my whip sword, anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes, ma'am!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes, ma'am!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes, ma'am!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's odd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's odd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's odd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's gotten into her? She would normally come when everything is finished and just put her name on the report.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's gotten into her? She would normally come when everything is finished and just put her name on the report.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's gotten into her? She would normally come when everything is finished and just put her name on the report.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I know why, sir.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think I know why, sir.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I know why, sir.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you see the recent match? Miss Ozymandias made a surprise appearance at the last minute.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you see the recent match? Miss Ozymandias made a surprise appearance at the last minute.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you see the recent match? Miss Ozymandias made a surprise appearance at the last minute.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There was a girl who reflected the champion's whip sword...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There was a girl who reflected the champion's whip sword...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There was a girl who reflected the champion's whip sword...

root.m_Talk_ENG: and I think that provoked her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: and I think that provoked her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: and I think that provoked her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The identity of an official Grade S Counter sure is convenient.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The identity of an official Grade S Counter sure is convenient.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The identity of an official Grade S Counter sure is convenient.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm able to go anywhere under the pretext of protecting the city whenever a Counterside Effect occurs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm able to go anywhere under the pretext of protecting the city whenever a Counterside Effect occurs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm able to go anywhere under the pretext of protecting the city whenever a Counterside Effect occurs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This will be the fifth one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This will be the fifth one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This will be the fifth one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, the only remaining Grand Dimension Crevice will be in Lotus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, the only remaining Grand Dimension Crevice will be in Lotus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, the only remaining Grand Dimension Crevice will be in Lotus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before I say goodbye to Charade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before I say goodbye to Charade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before I say goodbye to Charade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must take care of all loose ends.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must take care of all loose ends.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must take care of all loose ends.
